title: Deployment Regression — Rollback to Last Known Good
summary: A recent deployment introduced a regression. Error rate increased or service stopped responding after the rollout.
trigger_signals: metric: increase in HTTP 5xx rate correlated with rollout event
log: new exception type appearing after image change
ArgoCD sync event within 30 minutes of incident start
likely_causes: New image version contains a bug
Config change introduced bad environment variable
diagnostic_steps: Confirm rollout timestamp vs incident start: kubectl rollout history deployment/<n>
Compare error rate before/after rollout in Grafana
Check new image tag logs for new exception patterns

action_params.note: Roll back ArgoCD app to previous revision. Always requires human approval.

escalate_if: Database schema migration was applied — rollback may cause data issues
Multiple services affected — may be infrastructure-level
Rollback candidate also had known issues
